title: Requirements: conversation-context-management
description: Refine the PROMPT.md spec through questioning before handing off to Architect

title: Design: conversation-context-management
description: Write/update design.md with three clarifications: ownership clone, headless_with_limit, 26 tests

title: Design review: conversation-context-management
description: Adversarial review of the design document

title: Explorer: research codebase for conversation-context-management
description: Explore codebase, find patterns, document integration points, write context.md

title: Create implementation plan for conversation-context-management
description: Write plan.md with TDD test strategy and ordered implementation steps

title: Write code task files for conversation-context-management
description: Convert the implementation plan into code task files and materialize Step 1 runtime tasks

title: Step 1: Pure token estimation and split logic
description: Create ap/src/context.rs with estimate_message_tokens, estimate_tokens, find_summary_split. 8 unit tests. See .agents/scratchpad/implementation/conversation-context-management/tasks/task-01-pure-token-estimation-and-split-logic.code-task.md

title: step-02: ContextConfig in AppConfig
description: Add ContextConfig struct to ap/src/config.rs, integrate into AppConfig with serde support. See tasks/task-02-context-config-in-appconfig.code-task.md

title: Step 3: --context-limit CLI flag
description: Add --context-limit <TOKENS> CLI arg to ap, overlay onto config.context.limit. Backing file: .agents/scratchpad/implementation/conversation-context-management/tasks/task-03-context-limit-cli-flag.code-task.md

title: Step 4: TurnEvent::ContextSummarized + TUI fields + status bar
description: Add ContextSummarized variant to TurnEvent, add last_input_tokens/context_limit fields to TuiApp, extend handle_ui_event and render_status_bar, add arm to route_headless_events. 6 new tests (TDD). Backing file: .agents/scratchpad/implementation/conversation-context-management/tasks/task-04-turn-event-context-summarized-tui-fields-status-bar.code-task.md

title: Step 5: Async summarisation and maybe_compress_context
description: Implement summarise_context() and maybe_compress_context() in src/context.rs per task-05 code task file

title: Wire maybe_compress_context in Headless Path
description: Wire maybe_compress_context into run_headless in ap/src/main.rs. Clone conv_with_msg as fallback before calling, use compressed on Ok, log+fallback on Err.

title: Wire TUI path + headless_with_limit constructor
description: Wire maybe_compress_context into TUI handle_submit spawned task, add context_limit to TuiApp::new, add headless_with_limit constructor, update run_tui. See tasks/task-07-wire-tui-path-and-headless-with-limit.code-task.md

title: Validate conversation-context-management implementation
description: Run full validation: tests, build, lint, E2E, code quality
